items.name: CoinageClusterML
items.description: Machine Learning framework for predicting binding energies and magic numbers in Cu, Ag, and Au nanoclusters (N ≤ 55) using the Open Quantum Cluster Database (OQCD). Features 7 ensemble models, SHAP interpretability, and 9 geometric descriptors.

items.name: jaggery-color-classification
items.description: Machine learning framework for pre-manufacturing jaggery color prediction using soil and water parameters

items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: Forecasting-County-Level-Housing-Demand-Supply-Gaps-in-Ireland-2026-2030-
items.description: This repository operationalizes a county-level housing intelligence framework for Ireland, combining forecasting, explainable machine learning, and scenario-based demand planning to support evidence-based policy and resource allocation.

items.name: A-REFINED-MACHINE-LEARNING-SENSOR-FUSION-FRAMEWORK-FOR-HIGH-FIDELITY-VEHICLE-ACCIDENT-CLASSIFICATION
items.description: A multi-sensor ML framework using GY-87 IMU, NEO-6M GPS & ESP8266 on an RC vehicle to classify vehicle accidents (Collision, Fall-Off, Normal Driving) with 98.84% accuracy via a Stacking Ensemble (ANN + SVM + Decision Tree + Naive Bayes). Includes ADASYN augmentation, feature engineering, and permutation importance analysis. | B.Tech CSE

items.name: An-Explainable-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Diagnosing-Spine-Hip-Disorders
items.description: Complete analysis of the code (14 Python scripts), covering environment setup, data import, descriptive statistics, correlation analysis, dataset A/B modeling, ROC curves, SHAP analysis, feature importance, Bootstrap validation, calibration and DCA analysis, confusion matrix, and a Streamlit application.

items.name: Turingz
items.description: A hybrid machine learning and classical numerical framework for solving Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) , featuring real-time failure detection , robustness evaluation , and adaptive resource orchestration (deployment and computational cost)

items.name: interpretable-ai-shap-framework
items.description: An interpretable machine learning framework using SHAP values for model explainability on loan prediction data. Built with Python, Flask, and XGBoost.

items.name: A-Hybrid-Supervised-Unsupervised-Framework-for-Insider-Threat-Detection
items.description: Detects insider threats using machine learning by analyzing user behavior, system access, and anomalies. Includes simulated logs, anomaly detection models, a combined dashboard, explainability tools, graph analysis, and red team simulation.

items.name: pamiq-core
items.description: Framework for building AI agents with real-time adaptive learning capabilities.

items.name: nexus-machine-learning

items.name: Risk-Return-Efficient-Portfolio-Construction-via-Convex-Optimization-A-Machine-Learning-Approach
items.description: This project bridges deep learning forecasts and portfolio optimization. We evaluate five machine learning models on US equities, pairing their return predictions with Mean-Variance and CVaR allocation frameworks. Via walk-forward backtesting, we analyze how forecast errors impact out-of-sample portfolio performance and robustness.

items.name: Sauca_AI
items.description: A no-code AutoML and data science framework designed to democratize advanced machine learning and streamline predictive analytics.

items.name: High-Throughput-Dengue-ML
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework designed for the efficient analysis and classification of Dengue-related transcriptomic data

items.name: autonomous-dao-treasury
items.description: A smart-contract framework for self-managing DAO treasuries. It integrates machine learning models to adjust asset allocation based on market volatility and predefined risk parameters. Designed to ensure long-term sustainability by automating diversification and yield-harvesting without requiring constant manual intervention from members.

items.name: ASSISSTments-ML-XAI-Student-Performance
items.description: A comparative machine learning framework for student performance prediction using ASSISTments data, combining linear models (elastic net), ensemble methods (random forest, XGBoost), and explainable AI (SHAP).

items.name: Dual-Head-GNN-with-Adaptive-RL-Framework-for-FDIA-on-IIOT
items.description: Research work on False data injection attacks on Cyber Physical Systems using deep learning approaches. Novel Aprroach of Inter- and Intra machine based graph using spatio temporal model with Multi-Head Attention and used optimized Deep Q-Networks thershold.

items.name: ML_OFDM_PROJECT
items.description: The performance of different machine learning frameworks, like the support vector machine (SVM), random forest, gradient descent, and decision tree, is implemented to enhance the performance of the OFDM system model. The project can give effective performance concerning the machine learning model for different numbers of pilots and lengths of CPs.

items.name: QuantYogChain-Framework
items.description: QuantYogChain: Blockchain-Enabled Federated Quantum Machine Learning Framework for Secure YogAI-based Personalized Healthcare using wearable biosignal data (HRV, EDA, SpO2, Sleep). Includes VQC models, federated learning simulation, and blockchain-based aggregation.

items.name: DDOS_Mitigation
items.description: A lightweight and leakage-free machine learning framework for anomaly-based DDoS detection and mitigation in Modbus TCP industrial control systems, using protocol-specific features and real-time response mechanisms.

items.description: Machine learning framework for forecasting Air Quality Index (AQI) across major Indian cities using pollution and meteorological data. Includes preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, and comparative analysis of multiple regression models.

items.name: cerebrus
items.description: Cerebrus is an intelligent malware analysis framework designed to provide multi-layered defense against modern cyber threats. It integrates static analysis, machine learning, external threat intelligence, and explainable AI (XAI) to deliver a robust platform for detecting known and unknown malware across various file formats.

items.name: band-gap-delta-learning-dft-correction
items.description: Physics-informed machine learning framework to correct DFT (PBE) band gap errors using delta learning. Combines Magpie descriptors, PCA, Random Forest, and GPR to achieve ~0.55 eV RMSE, enabling accurate and scalable semiconductor materials discovery.

items.name: pennylane-qrack
items.description: The PennyLane-Qrack plugin integrates the Qrack quantum computing framework with PennyLane's quantum machine learning capabilities.

items.name: SECURAI
items.description: An advanced AI-powered security framework utilizing machine learning to detect anomalies, automate threat response, and provide predictive analytics for proactive network defense and data protection.

items.name: DDA3020-machine-learning-project
items.description: A hybrid trading framework combining LightGBM for trend prediction and PPO Reinforcement Learning for volatility-adaptive position sizing. Developed for DDA3020 at CUHK-Shenzhen.

items.name: QuantVn-WalkForward
items.description: An end-to-end Machine Learning Quantitative Trading framework designed for the Vietnam Stock Market, featuring strict Walk-Forward validation and realistic bt engine backtesting

items.description: C60.ai is a full-stack AutoML framework that builds, optimizes, and explains machine learning pipelines. C60 is experimental, deeply modular, and focused on adaptability, introspection, and autonomy — almost like a DAG-based scientific research assistant

items.name: AutoGradeNet
items.description: A Novel Fully Autonomous Machine Learning Framework for Human Free Multi Dimensional Student Assessment and Academic Performance Prediction

items.name: 42850NLPA3GROUP76
items.description: We're Group 76 on Wednesdays, 8:00 - 9:00. In this section, we will use a hybrid NLP framework to detect fake online reviews using machine learning and transformer-based models, with experimental evaluation on real-world datasets.

items.name: An-Interpretable-Machine-Learning-Approach-for-Diabetes-Risk-Prediction-
items.description: This Project focuses on developing an interpretable machine learning framework to predict the risk of diabetes using clinical diabetes data. The model integrates multiple patient features (glucose, insulin, BMI, age and blood pressure) to generate comprehensive risk assesment. Two types of models are used: Logistic Regression and Random Forest

items.name: PUREML-Machine-Learning-Toolkit-from-Scratch
items.description: PUREML is a custom machine learning library built entirely from scratch in Python. It focuses on implementing core machine learning algorithms and mathematical concepts without relying on external ML frameworks such as scikit-learn or TensorFlow.

items.name: ununennium
items.description: Ununennium (Element 119, the next alkali metal) represents the cutting edge of satellite imagery machine learning. This library provides a unified, GPU-first framework for end-to-end Earth observation workflows, from cloud-native data access through model training to deployment.

items.name: Forest-fire-prediction
items.description: Forest Fire Prediction is a Supervised Machine learning problem statements. Using Regression and Classification Algorithm, Regression and Classification Model is build that detected future fires based on certain Weather report.  A framework is created using Flask and deployed on Render

items.name: PhaseLearner
items.description: PhaseLearner is a modular machine-learning framework for extracting phase structure from many-body simulation data. Designed for DQMC and lattice models, it implements dimensionality reduction, latent-space analysis, and physics-informed deep learning models to locate critical parameters, identify symmetry breaking, and characterize emergent order.

items.name: A-NOVEL-HYBRID-MACHINE-LEARNING-AND-GENERATIVE-AI-FRAMEWORK-FOR-PERSONALIZED-HEALTHCARE-ANALYTICS
items.description: A novel hybrid framework combining machine learning and generative AI to deliver personalized healthcare analytics. It predicts disease risk, analyzes patient data, and generates tailored health insights using advanced models, improving early diagnosis, decision-making, and patient-centric care.

items.name: Prahari-DNS-Spoofing-Detection
items.description: Prahari is a lightweight, real-time DNS security framework designed to detect and mitigate DNS spoofing attacks, particularly Man-in-the-Middle (MITM) threats. The system integrates rule-based filtering, machine learning, and blockchain technology to provide a robust, scalable, and tamper-proof solution for modern network environments.

items.name: google-advanced-data-analytics-waze-project
items.description: End-to-end data analytics and machine learning project to predict user churn using Waze app data, following the PACE framework (Plan, Analyze, Construct, Execute).

items.name: Employee-Salary-ML-Project
items.description: Developing a robust machine learning framework to estimate minimum and maximum salary ranges for new job listings. Core Objective: Leverage historical job data to provide accurate financial forecasts that align with current market standards.

items.name: Fusarium-Virulence-Prediction
items.description: A multimodal machine learning framework for predicting Fusarium species virulence across multiple host plants.

items.name: british-airways-data-science
items.description: 🔥 Engineered a machine learning pipeline achieving 85% accuracy in predicting customer booking behavior, and a scalable demand forecasting framework supporting capacity planning across 1,500+ daily premium lounge departures at Heathrow Terminal 3.

items.name: ML-Portfolio-Optimization-and-Backtesting
items.description: Machine Learning based Dynamic Portfolio Optimization & Backtesting Framework for Indian Equities.

items.name: awesome-automl
items.description: A curated list of frameworks, platforms, tools, research, and learning resources for Automated Machine Learning (AutoML).

items.name: Digital-Twin-Framework-for-Industrial-Asset-Prognostics
items.description: This project is a Digital Twin–based predictive maintenance system that uses sensor data and machine learning to estimate the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of industrial equipment. By forecasting failures before they occur, the system enables proactive maintenance scheduling, reducing downtime, costs, and operational risks.

items.name: Spatiotemporal_AQI_Forecasting_in_Urban_India_Using_an_IoT_Integrated_Machine_Learning_Framework
items.description: Spatiotemporal Air Quality Index Forecasting in Urban India Using an IoT-Integrated Machine Learning Framework

items.name: Multimodal-Dyslexia-Risk-Detection-Using-Handwriting-and-Eye-Tracking-Data
items.description: AI-based dyslexia risk detection framework using handwriting images, synthetic sentence-level data, eye-tracking signals, classical machine learning, deep learning, and multimodal fusion models.

items.name: My-projects
items.description: I’m a passionate machine learning practitioner who transforms raw data into smart, real‑world applications. Over the past months, I’ve developed and deployed multiple end‑to‑end projects covering natural language processing, computer vision, and classical machine learning – all built from scratch or fine‑tuned using modern frameworks.

items.name: tox21-toxicity-ML-classification
items.description: A Machine Learning Framework for Toxicity Prediction in the Tox21 Dataset using hybrid molecular representations.

items.name: MEDFUSION-A-Medical-Diagnosis-Using-Symptoms-and-Image-
items.description: MedFusion is a healthcare diagnosis framework that makes disease prediction based on symptom and medical image analysis. It uses both machine learning and deep learning techniques (Convolutional Neural Network). This application assists in early diagnosis through an easy-to-use interface and is meant for educational purposes only.

items.name: ADINT
items.description: This repository presents the implementation of ADINT, a comprehensive six-phase machine learning framework designed to proactively detect threats in digital advertising content. The framework evaluates four distinct algorithms; Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, Bidirectional LSTM, and BERT

items.name: kaggle-competitions-portfolio
items.description: This repository contains my end-to-end solutions for various Kaggle competitions, showcasing data preprocessing, exploratory analysis, model training, and performance evaluation using Python and machine learning frameworks.

items.name: Gene-Expression-Based-Leukemia-Classification-Using-Feature-Selection-and-Machine-Learning
items.description: Gene expression–based leukemia classification framework using feature selection and machine learning. The project analyzes genomic data to distinguish ALL and AML leukemia types through dimensionality reduction, model comparison, and interpretable gene ranking for biomedical prediction tasks.

items.name: opifex
items.description: A unified scientific machine learning framework built on JAX/Flax NNX

items.name: Hallucination_Detection_Sytem
items.description: An automated Natural Language Processing framework designed to detect and classify hallucinations in AI-generated text by cross-referencing claims against authoritative sources using hybrid machine learning and semantic analysis.

items.name: Face_MeshApp
items.description: Aiming to build a face mesh system, you’re stepping into a mix of computer vision + machine learning + real-time processing. The good news: you don’t need to start from scratch—there are powerful frameworks that already do most of the heavy lifting

items.name: bare-metal-ml
items.description: A machine learning framework built from mathematical foundations, implementing classical ML algorithms from scratch in Python and C++ without the use of high-level ML libraries. All linear algebra operations, probability distributions, and optimization techniques are derived and implemented manually.

items.name: IoMT
items.description: Developed a hybrid machine learning framework for real-time anomaly detection and intelligent alert optimization in IoMT health monitoring systems. The system processes key vital signs (heart rate, SpO₂, blood pressure, temperature) to identify physiological anomalies and support timely clinical interventions in remote patient monitoring.

items.name: RARIF-Framework
items.description: AI-powered Road Accident Risk Prediction system using Machine Learning. Predicts low, medium, and high risk based on traffic and environmental data. Includes XGBoost model, evaluation metrics, and SHAP-based explainability for better insights.

items.name: XGBoost-Analytics-Pipeline-for-Post-Earnings-Drift-Detection
items.description: This project implements a data engineering and machine learning pipeline designed to detect post-earnings price anomalies by integrating free multi-source financial data. It uses an XGBoost regressor optimized via Optuna within a rigorous walk-forward framework to prevent data leakage and ensure realistic backtesting performance.

items.name: MLap
items.description: A framework 🛠️ which can capture information 📖 on both the development and operation stages in machine learning 🤖

items.name: MLFromCore
items.description: A growing machine learning framework built entirely from scratch in pure Python — no external libraries such as NumPy or scikit-learn.  The goal is to deeply understand how machine learning algorithms work internally by implementing them from first principles.

items.name: RLProject
items.description: RLProject is an Unreal Engine 5.5 project that explores the **Learning Agents** plugin-a machine learning framework for training AI characters using reinforcement learning (RL) and imitation learning (IL).

items.name: heart-disease-interpretability-shap
items.description: The research and implementation of an interpretable machine learning framework to predict heart disease using the UCI Heart Disease dataset.

items.name: APT_Manuscript_Script
items.description: A Machine Learning/Deep Learning framework for detecting Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) using CSE-CIC-IDS2018 & CIC-IDS2017 dataset. Features data preprocessing, feature engineering, and ensemble model evaluation in a Jupyter environment.

items.name: myopia-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework for discovering chronobiological gene signatures in myopia

items.name: data-ethics-fairness
items.description: A data analysis project on toxic content detection using machine learning, focused on improving accuracy, fairness, and interpretability across different labeling frameworks.

items.name: Diabetes_Prediction_OML
items.description: Machine learning framework for diabetes prediction using clinical data. Includes preprocessing, feature engineering, and model comparison (LR, SVM, NN, ensembles). Evaluated with precision, recall, F1-score, and ROC-AUC to ensure reliable and interpretable decision support.

items.name: SynapseEngine
items.description: Julia based Machine Learning framework for developing innovative avenues in Meta-Learning and AGI.
